title: Company Names Tribunal decision: BT Broadbandfiber Limited
body: "Application number 5377  Applicant British Telecommunications PLC  objected to the name used by BT Broadbandfiber Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 10 September 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of BT Broadbandfiber Limited is changed to SC834693, Ltd. "
